chain.thought: Explanation: Count the rows in the trophy era (1980–2013) where the winning team is Colorado State. These occur in rows 1, 3, 11, 13, 14, 15, 16, 17, 20, 22, 23, 24, 26, and 34, totaling 14 wins.
